rules.headings: tracking-tight, font-medium to font-semibold. Never use font-black. No uppercase display fonts.
rules.body: leading-relaxed, text-sm for dashboard density. Minimal line height.
rules.code: text-xs, tracking-tight, text-[#2563EB] or text-zinc-300 bg-[#18181B] border border-[#27272A] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Linear/Vercel aesthetic. Dense, precise, highly functional, unopinionated.
layout_and_spacing.corners: rounded-none or max rounded-sm. Absolutely no bubbly/large rounded shapes (no rounded-lg/xl/full unless it's an avatar).
layout_and_spacing.borders: 1px solid #27272A on almost all container edges to define structure.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: No soft shadows. Use elevation via background colors (#18181B) or hard 1px borders. Flat UI.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight spacing for dashboard components (p-4, p-6), precise optical alignment.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, sharp corners. Primary button: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-blue-700. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-zinc-300 hover:bg-[#18181B].
components_strategy.cards: bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#27272A] rounded-sm p-5 or p-6. Hover effect: border-zinc-600 transition-colors duration-200.
components_strategy.inputs: bg-[#09090B] border border-[#27272A] rounded-sm text-sm focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB] outline-none placeholder:text-zinc-600.
components_strategy.badges: Status badges must be minimal and sharp. Live: text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-400/10 border border-emerald-400/20. Draft: text-zinc-400 bg-zinc-800/50 border border-zinc-700. Scanning: text-[#2563EB] bg-blue-500/10 border border-[#2563EB]/30.
components_strategy.modals: Dialog overlay bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm. Dialog content bg-[#0F0F12] border border-[#27272A] rounded-sm.
components_strategy.icons: Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5 or 2. Size 16px or 18px for density.
components_strategy.avatar: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) instead of perfect circle to match the sharp aesthetic, or minimal text-based avatar.

auth_pages.layout: Split screen. 50% width form on pure black/bg (#09090B), 50% visual showcase on right.
auth_pages.visual_side: Use the provided abstract geometric tech background image. Full cover, subtle opacity.
auth_pages.form: Minimal, dense. Left-aligned text. Simple inputs.

dashboard_layout.sidebar: Fixed left, exactly 256px wide, bg-[#09090B] border-r border-[#27272A]. Navigation items with minimal hover state (bg-[#18181B]). Active state text-white bg-[#18181B] with a left #2563EB border accent, inactive text-zinc-400.
dashboard_layout.main_content: margin-left: 256px. min-h-screen bg-[#09090B]. Container max-w-6xl mx-auto p-8.
dashboard_layout.header: Top of main content. Includes breadcrumbs (e.g., Scalable / Projects), subtle text.

projects_grid.layout: CSS Grid, gap-6, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3.
projects_grid.empty_state: Dashed border border-[#27272A], flex-col center, muted text, minimal 'Create Project' button.

image_urls.description: Minimalist abstract dark geometric pattern, subtle 3d grid
Minimalist 3D cube structure in dark void, technical and precise

instructions_to_main_agent: UPDATE index.css variables to match the exact hex codes provided: replace root and dark mode variables to map to these hex values or use Tailwind arbitrary values (e.g., bg-[#09090B], border-[#27272A]) everywhere.
Since Tailwind config has dark mode 'class', ensure the 'dark' class is applied to the root html or body element. Or force dark mode by defaulting to dark classes.
Do NOT use soft shadows (shadow-lg, shadow-xl). Rely purely on 1px borders and background color differentiation for depth. Remove all Shadcn default shadows if any.
Ensure ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, dialog triggers) have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='project-card-1').
For the sidebar, it MUST be exactly 256px wide and persist across all authenticated pages. Use fixed positioning (w-64) and offset the main content (ml-64).
Fonts: apply 'font-sans' with Inter/Geist. Apply 'font-mono' for any API keys, paths, or code snippets.
No gradients allowed. Flat backgrounds only. No bubbly shapes, strictly rounded-sm or rounded-none for all components (cards, buttons, inputs, dialogs).
